title: Lemma 2.4: compression $\mathrm{Ad}(q^\perp_{\mathcal G_i})$ lands in $\tilde{\mathbb S}_{\mathbb X_{\mathcal G_i}}(M)$ and preserves $M$-centrality/normality

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
**Location:** Proof of Lemma 2.4, both branches ($\varphi(q_{\mathbb X_\cap})\neq0$ and $\varphi(q^\perp_{\mathbb X_\cap})=1$).

Two assertions need full justification:

(a) The algebra inclusion
$$\mathrm{Ad}(q^\perp_{\mathcal G_i})\big(\tilde{\mathbb S}_{\mathbb X_{\cap}}(M)\big)\subset q^\perp_{\mathcal G_i}\mathbb B(L^2M)^{\sharp*}_J q^\perp_{\mathcal G_i}\cap\iota^\sharp(JMJ)' \subset \tilde{\mathbb S}_{\mathbb X_{\mathcal G_i}}(M),$$
i.e. why compressing by $q^\perp_{\mathcal G_i}$ moves into the **smaller** relative small-at-infinity algebra. The analogous claim for the $\mathrm{Ad}(q_{\mathbb X_\cap})$ branch (landing in $\tilde{\mathbb S}_{\mathbb X_{\mathcal G_i}}(M)$ via $\mathbb X_{\cap}\subset\mathbb X_{\mathcal G_i}$) must also be verified from the [DKEP23, §8] definitions.

(b) That the rescaled functionals $\frac{1}{\varphi(q^\perp)}\varphi\circ\mathrm{Ad}(q^\perp)$ and $\frac{1}{\varphi(q_{\mathbb X_\cap})}\varphi\circ\mathrm{Ad}(q_{\mathbb X_\cap})$ are again **$M$-central** and **normal on $M$** — this requires $q^\perp_{\mathcal G_i}$ (resp. $q_{\mathbb X_\cap}$) to commute with $\iota^\sharp(M)$ and $\iota^\sharp(JMJ)$, and a check that compression preserves normality of the restriction to $M$.

These steps produce the contradiction in [DKEP23, Lemma 8.5], so they must be airtight.
